title: coelogyne erectilabia
intro: Coelogyne erectilabia, also known as the upright-lipped coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne erectilabia include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Coelogyne erectilabia are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
